title: circaeasteraceae
intro: The Circaeasteraceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics, such as a unique flower structure and leaf morphology. The Circaeasteraceae family is typically found in mountainous regions and is often characterized by its adaptability to harsh environments. With a limited number of species, the Circaeasteraceae family is a distinct and relatively rare group of plants.
